summary: Made Venice private reasoning load-bearing with adapter-runtime integration, redaction utilities, and comprehensive test coverage. Created private-reasoning.ts with redactPrivateReasoning, redactRunLogExport, and executeVeniceStep. Integrated Venice routing into the adapter-runtime and execution-log download paths. The redaction pipeline strips venice_reasoning and private_reasoning_content fields from all operator-visible surfaces.

strengths: Redaction approach is defense-in-depth: both individual content objects and full run-log exports have dedicated redaction functions
PRIVATE_REASONING_FIELDS constant centralizes the field names that trigger redaction
Venice step execution mirrors the adapter-runtime step pattern, making it consistent with the rest of the system
Integration with adapter-runtime.ts is clean — Venice is checked during resolveAdapterRuntime and routed when private_cognition_enabled is true
14 tests with thorough coverage of redaction, step execution, and integration points

issues.description: Redaction only walks one level of nesting. If private reasoning fields were nested deeper than two levels, they would not be caught. This is documented in the code comments.
issues.suggestion: Consider a recursive approach if deeper nesting becomes possible in future.

testCoverage.notes: 14 tests covering redaction of top-level and nested fields, run log export redaction, Venice step execution for all 4 steps, and adapter-runtime integration.
